title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mahagun Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mahagun Group
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
